title: SmartAttend AI - Face recognition Attendance System
description: A real-time AI-powered attendance management system that automatically marks attendance using facial recognition technology. Built a full-stack application with React, Node.js, MongoDB, and Python (FastAPI), featuring live analytics dashboards, department-wise attendance tracking, automated report generation (PDF/Excel), low-attendance email alerts, and secure role-based authentication.

title: Speed-Mart E-Commerce App
description: SpeedMart is a fully functional, full-stack E-Commerce web application designed to provide users with a smooth online shopping experience. It features a modern, responsive frontend and a secure, scalable backend. Users can browse products, manage their cart, maintain a wishlist, and place orders — all with real-time updates and clean UI interaction.

title: Netflix Clone Website
description: This project is a front-end replica of Netflix created using only HTML and CSS. It recreates the homepage layout, sections, and visual design of the original platform. The site is fully responsive, ensuring a smooth viewing experience across desktops, tablets, and mobile devices.

title: Employee Salary Prediction
description: This is a Machine learning project that predicts employee salary using regression models and a Streamlit demo.It is feeded by an dataset based on that it predicts salary as per given data.

title: Weather App
description: A simple Weather Application built with HTML, CSS, and python script using flask module that uses the OpenWeatherMap API to fetch and display live weather updates 🌍

title: College Predictor Tool
description: A web app that predicts engineering colleges and branches based on your exam rank and branch preference. Supports JEE Main, JEE Advanced, and WBJEE with category-priority predictions (ST → SC → OBC → General). Built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript using a JSON-based dataset.
